data.author: ahcorde
data.message:
Included abstraction for rcutils::shared_library (#49)

* Included abstraction for rcutils::shared_library

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Fixed headers and doc

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Added basic test with sanitizers for shared libray

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* fixed linters in test_shared_library.cpp

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* adapted to rcutils shared library API

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* rcutils is a depend in package.xml

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Added get_library_path method to SharedLibrary class

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* throw bad_alloc

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Added exception to docblock

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* fixed CMakeLists issues

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Default value for DISABLE_SANITIZERS to OFF

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Added more tests to test_shared_library

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Included rcutils_get_error_string and rcutils_reset_error

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Removed sanitizer in CMakeLists.txt

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* get_library_path throws an exception - updated docs too

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Removed comments and fixed test on shared library

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Fixed cpplint test_shared_library

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Added target_compile_definitions for dummy_shared_library

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Added get_platform_library_name to SharedLibrary

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Visibility of SharedLibray Class on windows

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Avoid noreturn issue on windows

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* Avoid noreturn issue on windows on more tests

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

* fixed docbloc

Signed-off-by: ahcorde <ahcorde@gmail.com>

data.author: cottsay
data.message:
Remove mention of random file from temporary_directory_path doc (#64)

The documented return value for this function seems to reference a
different temp function - one that returns a random temp filename. The
implementation is returning the path to a temp directory as instructed
through environment variables and not a path to a file.

Signed-off-by: Scott K Logan <logans@cottsay.net>

data.author: MichaelOrlov
data.message:
Replace create_temp_directory with the new create_temporary_directory (#198)

* Replace create_temp_directory with the new create_temporary_directory

- The newly added `create_temporary_directory(..)` uses
std::filesystem::path and doesn't have platform-specific code.
- Also deprecated `create_temp_directory(..)` and `temp_directory_path`

Signed-off-by: Michael Orlov <michael.orlov@apex.ai>

data.author: sebastian-freitag
data.message:
issue-167 (#172)

Explicitly added void to change the function to a function with prototype.
See https://discourse.llvm.org/t/rfc-enabling-wstrict-prototypes-by-default-in-c/60521
See https://reviews.llvm.org/D122895
Fixes: https://github.com/ros2/rcpputils/issues/167

Signed-off-by: Sebastian Freitag <sebastian.freitag@pylot.tech>

data.author: Abrar Rahman Protyasha
data.message:
Fix `IllegalStateException` reference in FEATURES (#135)

FEATURES.md incorrectly referred to `IllegalStateException`
as `InvalidStateException`, which prevented appropriate
linking in the generated documentation for the package.

Signed-off-by: Abrar Rahman Protyasha <abrar@openrobotics.org>
